name: Lucian Seraph

sheet.name: Lucian Seraph
sheet.background_story: Lucian Seraph, once a mortal man, was transformed by the divine touch of a god, his mind now a tumultuous blend of the purest angelic thoughts and the cunning wiles of a trickster devil. As an asset to the enigmatic Council of Ascendancy, his dual nature grants him unparalleled insight and adaptability, making him a formidable force in their service.

description: Lucian Seraph, once a mortal man, was transformed by the divine touch of a god, his mind now a tumultuous blend of the purest angelic thoughts and the cunning wiles of a trickster devil. As an asset to the enigmatic Council of Ascendancy, his dual nature grants him unparalleled insight and adaptability, making him a formidable force in their service.
